title: School Supplies * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > School Supplies * Families of Military Personnel/Veterans 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth ool Supplies Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Families of Military Personnel/Veterans Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OPERATION HOMEFRONT BACK TO SCHOOL BRIGADE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides backpacks filled with school supplies. Donations accepted year-round. 17319 San Pedro Avenue Suite 505 San Antonio, TX 78232 Eligibility: Dependent children of: -Post 9/11 wounded, ill, or injured service member of any rank, both currently serving and those no longer serving in the military or -All ranks, Active Duty, Guard and Reserves, any duty status or -Transitioning service members within 12 months of their discharge or retirement date Hours: Varies by location; check website Email (210) 659-7756 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
